Localization.Description: User passwords stored in cleartext were retrieved from process memory using the MimiPenguin MSF module

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} retrieved user passwords stored in cleartext in files "{datafield1}" and "{datafield2}" using payload file {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} retrieved user passwords stored in cleartext in files "{datafield1}" and "{datafield2}" using payload file {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
